name: emdash-agent-operator
description: Operate Emdash multi-agent workspaces with verifiable handoffs.

interface.shortDescription: Operate Emdash multi-agent workspaces with verifiable handoffs.
interface.longDescription: Plan, launch, review, and close Emdash multi-agent coding sessions with explicit workspace, worktree, handoff, and verification metadata.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the Emdash plugin to plan the workflow, identify verification checks, and produce plugin eval metadata.
